title: Kharkiv: Russia hits Kharkiv Oblast oil refinery, causing 'significant'...

description: Russia hits Kharkiv Oblast oil refinery, causing 'significant' damage. Russia has targeted the facility for the fifth time since launching its full-scale invasion in 2022, the refinery's legal director, Anastasiia Cherednykova, told Suspilne.
description_en: Russia hits Kharkiv Oblast oil refinery, causing 'significant' damage. Russia has targeted the facility for the fifth time since launching its full-scale invasion in 2022, the refinery's legal director, Anastasiia Cherednykova, told Suspilne.

title: Crimea: Strike confirmed
description: Ukraine strikes key oil transfer hub in Russian-occupied Crimea, military says. Unmanned Systems Forces commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi said the attack targeted fuel tanks but did not provide details on the strike's impact. Video: Robert "Magyar" Brovdi/Telegram
description_en: Ukraine strikes key oil transfer hub in Russian-occupied Crimea, military says. Unmanned Systems Forces commander Robert "Magyar" Brovdi said the attack targeted fuel tanks but did not provide details on the strike's impact. Video: Robert "Magyar" Brovdi/Telegram

title: Kyiv: 176 drones intercepted
description: At least 13 killed, 77 injured in Russian attacks on Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 176 drones at Ukraine overnight, the Air Force said, reporting that Ukrainian air defenses intercepted 146. Photo: Ukraine's Emergency Service

title: Kursk: Drone incoming
description: 146 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of April 8 (from 18:00 on April 7) the enemy attacked 176 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of UAVs from the directions: Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, near 120 of them are "martyrs". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...
description_en: 146 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of April 8 (from 18:00 on April 7) the enemy attacked 176 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and other types of UAVs from the directions: Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea, near 120 of them are "martyrs". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 146 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 08 квітня (з 18:00 07 квітня) противник атакував 176 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Брянськ, Курськ, Орел, Міллерово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., Чауда – ТОТ АР Крим, близько 120 із них – "шахеди". Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: 16 Cameroonians killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine, officials say. The acknowledgement, which was delivered to Yaounde by Russian officials and broadcast through Cameroonian state media on April 6, marks the first time Cameroon has formally spoken of its citizens' involvement in the Russia-Ukraine war.
description_en: 16 Cameroonians killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine, officials say. The acknowledgement, which was delivered to Yaounde by Russian officials and broadcast through Cameroonian state media on April 6, marks the first time Cameroon has formally spoken of its citizens' involvement in the Russia-Ukraine war.
description_uk: 16 Cameroonians killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine, officials say. The acknowledgement, which was delivered to Yaounde by Russian officials and broadcast through Cameroonian state media on April 6, marks the first time Cameroon has formally spoken of its citizens' involvement in the Russia-Ukraine war.

title: 4 killed, 16 injured
description: Foreign Minister Andriy Sybiga: "A terrible Russian terrorist act in Nikopol, a deliberate attack on an ordinary bus. Already 4 dead and 16 wounded civilians. Such brutal war crimes require a decisive response from the international community. Russian criminals must be pressured, isolated and held accountable."
description_en: Foreign Minister Andriy Sybiga: "A terrible Russian terrorist act in Nikopol, a deliberate attack on an ordinary bus. Already 4 dead and 16 wounded civilians. Such brutal war crimes require a decisive response from the international community. Russian criminals must be pressured, isolated and held accountable."
description_uk: Глава МЗС Андрій Сибіга: «Жахливий російський терористичний акт у Нікополі, навмисний удар по звичайному автобусу. Вже 4 загиблих та 16 поранених цивільних. Такі жорстокі воєнні злочини вимагають рішучої реакції міжнародної спільноти. Російські злочинці повинні зазнати тиску, ізоляції та відповідальності».

title: Nikopol: Drone strike
description: Seven people are currently in the hospital after a Russian FPV drone hit Nikopol on a regular city bus. Another nine received help on the spot. Unfortunately, four people died. My condolences to family and friends. The Russians continue their targeted terror against people in Nikopol and other towns and communities near the front line. The other day there was a cynical attack on the Nikopol market, which...
description_en: Seven people are currently in the hospital after a Russian FPV drone hit Nikopol on a regular city bus. Another nine received help on the spot. Unfortunately, four people died. My condolences to family and friends. The Russians continue their targeted terror against people in Nikopol and other towns and communities near the front line. The other day there was a cynical attack on the Nikopol market, which...
description_uk: Зараз у лікарні перебувають сім людей після удару російського FPV-дрона по Нікополю, по звичайній міській маршрутці. Ще девʼять отримали допомогу на місці. Чотири людини, на жаль, загинули. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Росіяни продовжують свій цілеспрямований терор проти людей у Нікополі та інших містах і громадах поблизу лінії фронту. Днями був цинічний удар по нікопольському ринку, який...

description: Minister Andriy Sybiga: "Moscow is extremely saddened by the rapid strengthening of Ukraine's ties with the Gulf countries against the background of Iranian air terror. They understand that Ukraine's unique experience has radically changed its role in the region. So they turned to propaganda to try to undermine Ukraine's contribution. They are spreading fakes that Ukrainian experts have suffered, that Ukraine is not fulfilling its...

They understand that Ukraine's unique experience has radically changed its role in the region. So they turned to propaganda to try to undermine Ukraine's contribution. They are spreading fakes that Ukrainian experts have suffered, that Ukraine is not fulfilling its...
description_uk: Міністр Андрій Сибіга: «У Москві вкрай засмучені стрімким зміцненням зв'язків України з країнами Затоки на тлі іранського повітряного терору. Там розуміють, що унікальний досвід України кардинально змінив її роль у регіоні. Тому вони звернулися до пропаганди, щоб спробувати підірвати внесок України. Вони поширюють фейки про те, що українські експерти постраждали, що Україна не виконує своїх...
